mods.name: MegaHoe
mods.description: Hoe tool overhaul with biome painter, extended terrain editing, and configurable radius

mods.name: MegaMegingjord
mods.description: Megingjord belt powers — carry weight, headlamp, swamp key, sealbreaker, wishbone, seafloor walk

mods.name: MegaFood
mods.description: MegaFood + MegaMead — 150 HP/Stam/Eitr food, 14 toggleable mead effects, configurable duration. MegaMead Base is brewed at the Mead Ketil.

mods.name: MegaShot
mods.description: Crossbow & firearms overhaul — scope w/ Night/Heat/NightToDay vision modes (N) + creature labels, Armageddon OneShot meteor-slam

mods.name: MegaQoL
mods.description: Quality of life — auto repair, refueller, ballista, map teleport, quicker portals, no mist, instant mining, Shield Generator bubble/prong toggles, Warden (active Wards make build pieces + plantables in radius immune to damage), and Tamed Spike Immunity (your own Sharp Stakes, Ashwood Stakewall and Dvergr Sharp Stakes no longer skewer your tamed animals; wild mobs still cop it). New Tamed Range (16, default off): widens Valheim's active-zone radius so your tamed creatures stay simulated and interactive (follow/react/move) much further from you instead of freezing once you wander off — ActiveZoneRadius 2-4 (~128/192/256m). Global setting that keeps other nearby objects and creatures simulated further too, so it carries a CPU/RAM cost near busy bases. Ballista now holds fire without a clear line of sight to its target, plus optional infinite Flametal-Bolt ammo and an optional MegaShot-Armageddon firing animation (Staff-of-Lightning bolt + meteor-crash on impact). MegaShot's ALT-fire destroy bolt can bypass the Warden to clear protected objects in the way (toggle in 12. Warden). New Boat Map Reveal (17, on by default): while you're aboard a Raft, Karve, Longship or Drakkar, the map's fog-of-war uncovers a much larger area around you so sailing scouts the world (RevealMultiplier, ~8x by default). Build Dust Removal & Rune Build live in MegaBuilder v1.5.0+; auto-prunes orphan config sections on launch.

mods.name: MegaStuff
mods.description: Storage — quick deposit (respects AzuEPI extra rows), chest auto-pickup (loose food pulled, items on stands/Serving Tray spared), configurable chest sizes (up to 8 rows), Cart + Boat storage (Raft/Karve/Longship/Drakkar) configurable too, craft from containers, pet feeder, ALT+click ignore-from-deposit with visible lock badge (bottom-right), blocks Place Stacks too, SHIFT+drag chest windows, AzuEPI Extra Rows cap bumped 5→8, auto-prunes orphan config sections on launch. Chest deposit sparkle now fires once per chest (not once per item in a big dump), lingers longer (Speed config), and the sound is toggleable. Pet Feeder can now also feed and tame UNTAMED creatures from chests (FeedUntamed toggle, default on). Leave-1 rule: crafting, requireOnlyOne crafting, and the Pet Feeder always keep at least 1 of each item type in a chest so it stays a valid auto-deposit target — no more draining the last wood to craft or pets emptying a food chest.

mods.name: MegaFarming
mods.description: Mass farming — hold-key mass harvest pickables/beehives, grid plant any cultivator plant (smart spacing so big bushes don't overlap), plant anywhere (any biome), plus custom plantables (bushes, mushrooms, thistle, fiddleheads, royal jelly) added to the Cultivator. Middle-click a crop while holding the Cultivator to remove it, growth + respawn timer hover (saplings AND picked berry bushes / mushrooms etc.), stump markers on picked renewables.

mods.name: MegaFishing
mods.description: Fish auto-pull into containers/inventory with quality upgrade and configurable radius

mods.name: MegaFactory
mods.description: Smart factory: same-type stations sharing nearby chests form a cluster and auto-divide the work - drop 4 smelters next to Tin/Copper/Silver/Iron and they each pick one ore, blast furnaces split Black Metal/Flametal, no work orders needed (SmartDistribution config, default on - toggle off for manual work orders). Spare stations double up on the busiest stockpile; surplus stations are idled so output can't overfill storage. Manual work orders now alternate (round-robin) between multiple loaded orders so every metal progresses together instead of finishing one before the next (AlternateWorkOrders config, default on). Smelter & Blast Furnace now show what's currently loaded per ore - on hover and in the Shift+E work-order panel. Auto-feeds Kiln/Smelter/Blast Furnace/Windmill/Spinning Wheel/Eitr Refinery in the background regardless of player distance, leaves 1 of each item type per container. With MegaStuff pull-to-chest on, stations freeze when output storage is full and auto-resume when space frees.

mods.name: MegaTrainer
mods.description: In-game cheat trainer — god mode, fly, no cost, explore map, always rested, infinite eitr, tame all, no structure damage, fast skill up, speed/jump controls

mods.name: MegaBuilder
mods.description: Rotation-aware decorative snap (sconces/torches/signs centre on rotated walls), grid-align respects vanilla snap on structural pieces (rotated floors line up cleanly), 0.25/0.5/1/2/4m grid sizes for open-ground placement, build-dust removal, rune-build (bypass no-build zones), ALT+click hammer radius-repair (1-100m, default 10m), plus new no-collision placement (clip pieces into terrain/other pieces/players, off by default) and dungeon build (place inside dungeons/interiors, off by default); auto-prunes orphan config sections on launch; furniture snaps to the piece you point at, including angled/octagon builds.

mods.name: MegaSkeletons
mods.description: Summoned skeleton buffs (health, speed, HoT, line-of-sight) + portal/dungeon persistence + remote skeleton detonator (AOE explosion + housefire damaging hostiles, trees, rocks and world structures — player builds & pickables spared)

mods.name: MegaDvergr
mods.description: Tameable Dvergr companions — wild-tame the five variants (Dvergr Rogue, DvergerAshlands, and the Ice/Fire/Support mages) by feeding cooked food only (Cauldron/Oven/Prep Table/Cooking stations); pairs with MegaStuff's Pet Feeder (FeedUntamed) to tame from a stocked chest. The Dead Raiser staff now summons a tamed dvergr warband instead of skeletons, one-of-each scaled by staff level (Ashlands → +Ice → +Fire → +Support, 2-star), topped up on each cast.

mods.name: MegaPlanner
mods.description: Capture every built piece within a configurable radius into a JSON blueprint (F9 default), then re-place the entire structure later from a menu (F10 default). Replay HUD shows the full running material budget with proper localised names (have/need per material). Free Build option (config + auto-engages with MegaTrainer's no_placement_cost cheat) skips materials entirely. Ghost is independent of the player — walk freely with WASD/mouse, manipulate the ghost with arrow keys: Left/Right rotate, Up/Down raise/lower (Shift = fast), Alt+arrows nudge XZ in your view direction. Mousewheel-zoom placement camera (close third-person <-> godview), R resets zoom, Home resets ghost offsets. Terrain-aware foundation extension (perimeter-only, snap-point-based stacking, strict whitelist of Building-category walls/floors/foundations/beams). Live 3D preview in the menu, paced placement, pulls materials from inventory + nearby chests.

mods.name: MegaDragons
mods.description: Tameable, near-unkillable companion dragons. Wild-tame Mountain Hatchlings (Drakes) with raw meat (ground or MegaStuff Pet Feeder); tamed Drakes follow/stay, keep up with you at a sprint or in the air, spot threats from afar, pack 10,000 HP + elemental immunity, heal when they eat, and auto-defend you. Crouch + interact to name your dragon (each starts with a random dragon name). One dragon at a time. Craft a Dragon Whistle to call your dragon down beside you from anywhere in the world (G, or equip + click), or release it to raise a new one. RIDE & FLY: craft a Dragon Saddle (Workbench lvl 4), fit it, and mount up — a visible saddle appears on the dragon's back, and you get true 360-degree look-to-fly (aim anywhere, even straight up or down), sprint, altitude control and auto-hover. While mounted, the map's fog-of-war reveals a huge area around you as you fly. DRAGON BREATH: while mounted the dragon auto-breathes fire at nearby threats, and Left Click fires its breath when you're unarmed. GROW A MODER: build Dragon Food at a Food Preparation Table with the Feaster and place it beside your tamed Hatchling — it feasts serving-by-serving and matures into a tamed, rideable Moder that keeps its name, owner, level and saddle.

mods.name: MegaDebug
mods.description: Floating diagnostic mod — on-demand probes (managed-heap/ZDO/object counters + ZDO census) for debugging game issues. Install to diagnose, remove when done. All output gated by [99. Debug] DebugMode.

mods.name: FarmBuild
mods.description: Standalone (not Mega series): MegaBuilder-style build-piece grid snap (F7 toggle on/off, F6 cycles 0.25/0.5/1/2/4m) plus MegaFarming mass farming (hold hotkey to mass-harvest pickables, pickable-items and beehives within radius, or grid-plant a configurable WxL block). Furniture snaps to the piece you point at, including angled/octagon builds. Farm grid obeys the F7 snap toggle; FarmGridSize (0 = follow the build grid F6 size) sets the plant cell size, auto-widening so bushes never overlap. No MegaBuilder/MegaFarming dependency.
